---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve
title: "[BUG]"
labels: ''
assignees: ''

---

### Tips for a helpful bug report
* Please use this template to report the bug and delete the instructions once you have read them.
* Please check whether somebody has reported the same problem in the [issues](https://github.com/alekseyenko/WdStar/issues).

---
**Describe the bug**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

**Steps to reproduce the behavior:**
```r
# Please include a **minimal reproducible example**, a reprex, to demonstrate the bug.
# Use one of the built-in datasets to demo the issue, such as mtcars, iris, PlantGrowth, and USArrests.
data(mtcars)

# Copy your code to the clipboard and run:
reprex::reprex()

# When I run this '...' 

# I run into this problem/error '...'

```

**Expected behavior**
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

**Screenshots**
If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
 - OS: [e.g. Windows 10 64 bit, MacOS Silicon, MacOS Intel]
 - R Version [e.g. 4.5.3]
 - WdStar Version [e.g. 2.0]
